title: Joshua's Conquest Journey
description: A modest route tracing key locations in the entry and early settlement of the land.
caution: Several conquest locations are debated, and the campaign sequence is simplified for teaching purposes.

stops.name: Shittim
stops.description: The staging area before crossing the Jordan.
stops.notes: A narrative starting point rather than a fixed archaeological site.

stops.name: Jordan Crossing
stops.notes: The crossing site is not precise in the text.

stops.name: Jericho
stops.description: The first major city in the campaign narrative.
stops.notes: A classic conquest location with strong narrative importance.

stops.name: Ai
stops.description: The site of defeat and later victory.
stops.notes: The identification of Ai remains debated.

stops.name: Shechem
stops.description: The covenant renewal and farewell setting.
stops.notes: Represents the settlement and covenant stage.

segments.label: First city
segments.caution: A single line represents the campaign approach.

segments.label: Into the hills
segments.description: The route moves into the highlands.
segments.caution: The geography and identification are debated.

segments.label: Covenant renewal
segments.description: Joshua leads the people to Shechem.
